name: io.github.arcadia-finance/mcp-server
title: Arcadia Finance
description: MCP server for Arcadia Finance — manage concentrated liquidity positions with leverage, automated rebalancing, and yield optimization on Base, Optimism, and Unichain.

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_BASE
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Base (8453). Falls back to public RPC if not set.

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_OPTIMISM
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Optimism (10). Falls back to public RPC if not set.

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_UNICHAIN
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Unichain (130). Falls back to public RPC if not set.

environmentVariables.name: PK
environmentVariables.description: Private key for dev-only signing (not for production).
